transaction: database-authoritative admission → dispatch → receipt → accounting → output/proof → repair
selection_basis: repository evidence, production invariants, dependency prerequisites, and coherent transaction compression
software_invariant_coverage: computed from software_invariant_hypergraph.json; candidate-group edges are not used
evidence_boundary: The transaction remains justified by the simpler evidence-and-invariants baseline even if graph/diversity terms are removed. Causal improvement requires implementation_ablation.json independent outcomes.
